CustomMetadata.label: FUE-002 - Files configured to execute in

values.value: Files configured to execute inline in browser
One or more file extension dispositions are set to INLINE. Files with inline disposition are rendered directly by the browser when opened, rather than being downloaded.
Attacker-uploaded SVG, HTML, or XML files with INLINE disposition can execute embedded JavaScript in the context of the authenticated user session, enabling stored XSS attacks.
Set all file extensions to Download only or Hybrid disposition in Setup > Security > File Upload and Download Security. Never allow inline execution of SVG, HTML, or XML files.
